title: Crispy Sweet Brazilian Mango Salad
description: A vibrant Brazilian mango salad with sweet poached mango, crunchy chickpeas, and a creamy vegan mayo dressing, perfect for monsoon-season afternoons.

ingredients.name: Mango
ingredients.amount: 2 medium ripe mangoes, peeled, sliced into 1/4-inch rounds

ingredients.name: Roasted chickpeas
ingredients.notes: toss chickpeas with 1 tbsp coconut oil, pinch salt and paprika; spread on a baking sheet and roast at 400°F (200°C) for 20 minutes until golden

instructions: Toss chickpeas with coconut oil, salt, and paprika. Spread on a baking sheet and roast 20 minutes until golden and crunchy. Let cool slightly.

In a shallow dish, place mango slices. In a small saucepan, combine lime juice and agave syrup, heat gently until syrup is warm (do not boil). Drizzle warm syrup over mango slices and let sit for 3 minutes. Remove and set aside.
In a small bowl, whisk vegan mayonnaise with a splash of lime juice, salt, and pepper until creamy. (Optional: add a pinch of sugar if you prefer a sweeter dressing).
In a large salad bowl, combine cucumber, red onion, chopped cilantro, and poached mango slices. Toss gently with the mayo dressing until evenly coated.
Sprinkle roasted chickpeas over the salad and give a final gentle toss.
Serve immediately, garnished with extra cilantro or a lime wedge if desired.
